Invest with The Chocolate Future

Terms of Service

Last updated: July 14, 2026

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing The Chocolate Future website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, you should not use or access our service.

Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. You represent that you are over the age of 18 and have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements.

Service Description

The Chocolate Future provides an investment platform focused on Ghana’s cocoa value chain initiative. This includes information about our mission, impact areas, and opportunities to invest in local processing infrastructure.

User Responsibilities

You agree to:

  • Provide accurate and complete information
  • Not use the service for illegal purposes
  • Respect intellectual property rights
  • Not interfere with or disrupt the service
  • Maintain account security

Investment Participation

To participate in investments through The Chocolate Future:

  • You must provide accurate information
  • You acknowledge this is not regulated securities advice
  • You agree to our investment agreement terms
  • You understand risks associated with diaspora investment initiatives

Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and design, is the property of The Chocolate Future or its content suppliers and is protected by copyright laws.

Limitation of Liability

The Chocolate Future shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of this service. Our liability is limited to the amount you paid for services rendered, if applicable.

Disclaimer

Information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute professional financial, legal, or investment advice. Consult qualified professionals before making investment decisions.

No Warranty

The service is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws applicable to businesses registered in Delaware, USA and Ghana.

Termination

We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to our service immediately, without prior notice, for violation of these Terms or for any other reason at our discretion.

Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or website notice. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.

Contact Us

For questions about these Terms, contact us at:

  • Email: info@chocolatefund.com
